set(SUPPORT_COMPUTE_UNIT "ascend950")
set(SUPPORT_TILING_DIR "arch35")

add_modules_sources(HOSTNAME ${OPHOST_NAME} MODE PRIVATE DIR ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} OPTYPE apply_proximal_gradient_descent ACLNNTYPE aclnn_exclude COMPUTE_UNIT ${SUPPORT_COMPUTE_UNIT} TILING_DIR ${SUPPORT_TILING_DIR} DISABLE_IN_OPP TRUE)
